title: Trade Professionals
summary:

Who We Partner With Reliable Technology. Zero Call-backs. Protect your margins and your reputation with dependable wine storage solutions that arrive

The post Trade Professionals appeared first on Wine Enthusiast.
content:
WINE ENTHUSIAST est. 1979

Partner With The #1 Leader in Wine Storage

As a Trade Partner, you gain a dedicated resource with 47 years of industry-leading wine expertise and innovation.

Become a Partner

One Team, Expert Knowledge, Total Protection

We handle the technical details of protecting your clients’ collections, from the first floor plan to the final bottle, so you can focus on delivering a flawless project.

Who We Partner With

Luxury & Custom Builders

Spec-ready solutions  for zero-call-backs

Architects & Interior Designers

Where modern design meets preservation

Hospitality & Private Clubs

Commercial-grade solutions to protect your liquid assets

Luxury & Custom Home Builders

Expertise That Elevates Every Build


Protect project timelines, margins, and professional reputation with the technical benchmark in precision wine preservation. Our industrial designers and sommeliers, test and deliver spec-ready wine cellars built to integrate seamlessly into custom structural blueprints without ever compromising fine wine preservation science.

Become a Partner

Reliable Technology. Zero Call-backs.

Protect your margins and your reputation with dependable wine storage solutions that arrive on time and perform exactly as promised. Our streamlined pricing, fast shipping, and proven technology make specifying simple and installation worry-free.

The Wine Enthusiast Edge

Builder-Friendly Pricing

Whether one refrigeration unit or a full custom cellar, we provide volume pricing designed to support multi-unit, custom, and high-end luxury projects.

White Glove Delivery

We ensure your project is delivered with care and on time.

The Luxury Advantage

Exclusive access to patented VinoView Showcase Cellars and EuroCave, widely regarded as the gold standard in wine aging. Their cellars provide the climate fine wine needs to mature properly for decades.

Architects & Interior Designers

Modern Design Meets Masterful Preservation

True luxury leaves no room for architectural compromise. Others build industrial appliances designed for passive food chilling environments that dry out corks, trigger rapid oxidation, and compromise fine wine. We’ve spent years engineering and handcrafting wine storage solutions that actively safeguard wine and elevate the overall aesthetics.

Become a Partner

Design-Forward Solutions, Not Just Industrial Appliances

Complete your projects with our handcrafted furniture collections, developed in-house to integrate seamlessly into architectural plans, support your design vision, and elevate the overall aesthetics of the environment.

The Wine Enthusiast Edge

Design-Forward Collections

Wine cellars and furniture developed in-house by sommeliers and product experts, where performance supports great design.

Earn Continuing Education Credits

AIA and IDCEC CEU credit courses available through our Wine Science Masterclasses.

White-Glove Design Support

Complimentary 2D and 3D layouts to help you specify and present with confidence.

Get Inspired

Upcoming AIA CEU Courses

Enroll in one of our AIA CEU credit courses and deepen your knowledge of wine storage & proper preservation.

Wine Storage 101: Architectural Cellar Storage Design + Tasting Experience

An introduction to the science of wine aging: temperature, humidity, vibration, and light — and how proper storage conditions protect and enhance a collection over time.

Register for Course

Wine Racking & Cooling Systems CEU Courses

Integrating wine storage into architectural and interior design projects: best practices for specification, spatial planning, and delivering a seamless client experience.

View All Courses

Hospitality & Private Clubs

The Professional Standard for Wine Protection & Profit

Safeguard your beverage program & front-of-house profit margins. We engineer for high-traffic environments and rapid inventory access, immediate visual rotation, and heavy-duty reliability. We help minimize service lag and maximize vintage security for worry-free operations.

Become a Partner

Trusted by the World’s Leading Hospitality Groups

From Le Meriden Hotel and NoBu Restaurants to JW Marriott and Big Sky Resorts, we provide commercial-grade solutions backed by family-owned ethical values.

The Wine Enthusiast Edge

Reliable Fulfillment

Consistent inventory and dependable delivery timelines to keep projects and openings on schedule.

Expert Design Partnership

Thoughtful guidance on proper layout and placement of units, capacity, and integration to ensure performance and visual impact.

Dedicated Ongoing Support

Responsive service before, during, and after installation so your team can operate with confidence.

“What matters most in a wine fridge for hospitality businesses? Proper spacing of fridges for ventilation, thoughtfully placed door handles, and shelves that comfortably fit Burgundy, Bordeaux, and even magnums without compromising space.”

Anna-Christina Cabrales
Wine Enthusiast Magazine Tasting Director

Engineering for Scale and Inventory Efficiency.

Our label-forward VinoView wine cellars increase visibility of inventory, increasing staff efficiency, and ensuring your collection is well protected.

Download the Hospitality Brochure

Apply to Become a Trade Partner

Please fill out the form below, and our team will get back to you shortly.

Prefer a Custom Cellar Design or Enclosed Wine Room?

Some clients start by looking at wine fridges and then realize they prefer a custom wine cellar instead. 

We offer design services and will integrate with your specs, as an alternative option to a built-in, panel ready, or stand-alone cellar.

Explore Our Custom Cellars

Get Started

Let’s Plan Your Visit

From custom wine storage to thoughtfully chosen accessories, we’ll curate a private shopping experience designed around how you collect, serve, and savor wine.

Book an Appointment

Get Directions
27 Greene Street New York, NY 10013
Between Grand Street and Canal Street

Monday – Saturday: 11:00am to 7:00pm
Sunday: 12:00pm to 6:00pm

title: How Our First 100-Point Spirit Earned Its Perfect Score
summary:
Cazcanes’ Destilado de Agave Nuestras Raices Still Strength Blanco stands out for its impressive blend of purity and complexity.

The post How Our First 100-Point Spirit Earned Its Perfect Score appeared first on Wine Enthusiast.
content:
It may be hard to believe, but this tequila is the first 100-point spirit I’ve ever published in 15 years of reviewing spirits for Wine Enthusiast. 

To be fair, it’s not the first 100-pointer I’ve assigned. Early in my tenure, a Japanese whisky earned a perfect score. But when it became clear that the whisky was a limited allocation that had already sold out in the United States, we yanked it from the lineup, and the review never ran. The magic happened again a few years ago, with a delightful Armagnac… that turned out to be not imported to the U.S. So that review never published, either.

Starting this year, Wine Enthusiast does review wine and spirits that are not imported into the U.S. But it also just so happened that one bottle that is available Stateside did get a perfect score. And I’m not pulling any punches this time.

In a recent blind tasting of blanco tequilas, Cazcanes Destilado de Agave Nuestras Raices Still Strength Blanco stood out as remarkably expressive and beautifully untamed in a way that few spirits can be.

Let me break it down: This is a destilado de agave (agave distillate), meaning it’s not certified as tequila, though it has all the hallmarks and was tasted alongside blanco tequilas. While Cazcanes makes several tequila expressions, including still-strength blancos, this distillate was made at a remote location, away from Cazcanes’ usual distillery, which was not certified by Mexico regulators. Opting to release a non-certified bottling was a deliberate choice, and one I’m glad was made.

The liveliness and complexity of the liquid is what made it so memorable. Every sip seemed to taste a little different—by turns citrusy, vegetal, grassy, and lightly spiced.

Yet, it wasn’t flashy. It had depth. It enticed, rather than hit you over the head (or the palate, so to speak). Usually, “still strength” is code for overproof spirits, of which I’m generally not a fan. This one, bottled at 47% (most tequilas are bottled around 40%), seemed worthy of the extra proof, resulting in bold flavor, not fire.

Founded in 2018, Cazcanes is a relatively small operation; its name refers to the Cazcan people, an indigenous group in Mexico. Humberto Alvarado, a third-generation master distiller, is cited as the original inspiration for the brand, after he shared rustic, ancestral-style distillate with the founders.

He doesn’t make the standard-issue Cazcanes—that would be master distiller Francisco “Don Chico” Jimenez Lazcarro, who has made some Cazcanes bottlings that have also scored well. 

But Don Chico isn’t the author of this particular 100-point bottling. For that, credit is due to Alvarado, who created this agave distillate in a small taberna in the jungles of Jalisco. The company’s nickname for the liquid is “Jugo de la Selva,” i.e. jungle juice. I prefer to go with Alvarado’s name for the small-batch distillate: Nuestras Raices, which is Spanish for “our roots.” Whatever you call it, it’s phenomenally expressive, agave-forward with tons of bell pepper and jalapeño, lime peel, and a surprising hint of cacao tumbling into an extraordinarily long finish showing crumbled sage, ginger root, and a final flicker of cayenne.

Of note, Cazcanes might not be a small brand for long. In late 2025, Jeff Kozak, previously CEO of Vermont’s Whistlepig whiskey, signed on as president of Cazcanes, and brought in execs formerly with Bacardi and Samson & Surrey. I’ll be keeping an eye on what happens next. Here’s hoping it leads to more bottlings like this one.

Cazcanes Destilado de Agave Nuestras Raices Still Strength Blanco

Note: this is not certified as a tequila nor mezcal, it’s a destilado de agave (agave distillate). Nomenclature be damned – this is an exquisite spirit. It’s downright kaleidoscopic, by turns citrusy, vegetal, lightly spiced, ever-changing from one sip to the next. But if it must be pinned down: expect a zesty aroma and a lively, complex, bold flavor. Tons of bell pepper and jalapeno, lime, and surprising hint of cacao give way to an extraordinarily long finish showing crumbled sage, slivers of lime peel, and ginger root, extinguished by a final cayenne flicker. This is one to sip and share. 2025 Special Edition. Nuestras Raices means “our roots.” 100 Points — Kara Newman 

$85 Cazcanes

More Spirits Coverage

  • Get in the soccer spirit with cocktails for 26 of the World Cup countries.
  • There’s a time and place for everything—even a vodka martini.
  • Sip like a star with this whisky cocktail served at the Tony Awards.
  • High abv is overtaking age-statement bottlings in the world of Scotch prestige.
  • You heard it here first—it’s the summer of pineapple cocktails.

In the shop

Riedel Tequila Glass (Set of 2)

In Stock | $39

Shop Now

The post How Our First 100-Point Spirit Earned Its Perfect Score appeared first on Wine Enthusiast.

title: Fourth of July
summary: The post Fourth of July appeared first on Wine Enthusiast.
content:
Summer-Proof Storage

Peak summer is the ultimate test for a serious collection, as high heat forces wine to age prematurely and degrades the complex flavors you’ve waited to enjoy. Our precision storage is designed to maintain the ideal climate and keep every bottle perfectly chilled—because when it comes to preservation, we’ve got it down to a science.

Shop Wine Cellars by Bottle Count: 6-50, 51-150, 151-300, 300+ | Best Sellers | Explore & Learn

Collector Favorites

The crowd has spoken, and they swear by these fan-favorite cellars. Explore cooling storage that’s consistently praised for keeping your bottles safe and your home bar looking seriously sharp.

EuroCave Revelation L Wine Cellar

VinoView L 155 Smart WiFi Single Zone Wine Cellar

Wine Enthusiast Classic 80 Wine Cellar

Wine Enthusiast 50-Bottle Wine Refrigerator

Wine Enthusiast 32- Bottle Dual Zone Wine Fridge

Wine Enthusiast 12-Bottle Slimline Wine Fridge with Upright Storage

Small Collections

6-50 Bottles

Every great collection starts somewhere. Whether you’re at the beginning of your wine journey or just want a curated handful of bottles on hand for hosting, our compact coolers and elegant fridge-equipped furniture protect your pours without crowding your space.

Shop All 6-50 Bottle Wine Fridges

Expanding Collections

51-150 Bottles

The collecting spark has officially taken hold—and as you move from buying for tonight to cellaring for tomorrow, your storage needs to keep up. From mid-sized fridges to sophisticated sideboards with built-in cooling options, explore solutions that give your evolving passion the home it deserves.

Shop All 51-150 Bottle Wine Cellars

Established Collections

151-300 Bottles

To protect a collection of this caliber, precision is everything. Our premium high-capacity storage units offer the advanced humidity and temperature control your prized bottles demand, along with the exquisite presentation worthy of a dedicated connoisseur.

Shop All 151-300 Bottle Wine Cellars

Legacy Collections

301+ Bottles

At this stage, your collection represents a lifetime of curation, travel, and investment—and an achievement like that needs to be preserved with the ultimate care. Discover large-capacity cellaring solutions built to protect and showcase an exceptional collection for years to come.

Shop All 301+ Bottle Wine Cellars
